message:
feat: process re-launch engine — restart shells and agents in restored panes (wa-32z7)

Add restore_process.rs: ProcessLauncher with plan-first safety model for
restarting processes in restored panes. Features: plan/execute separation,
shell auto-launch (bash/zsh/fish/etc.), agent re-launch with explicit opt-in
and state-loss warnings, interactive program detection (vim/htop/etc.),
staggered launches, configurable agent command templates, deterministic
plan ordering. 21 tests covering planning, execution, mixed actions,
safety guards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
